nasb.text: For judgment will be merciless to one who has shown no mercy; mercy triumphs over judgment.

esv.text: For judgment is without mercy to one who has shown no mercy. Mercy triumphs over judgment.

cnv.text: 因為對不行憐憫的人，審判他們的時候就沒有憐憫；憐憫勝過審判。

ccb.text: 因为不怜悯人的会受到无情的审判，但怜悯胜过审判。

csbs.text: 要知道，那不施怜悯的人，要受毫无怜悯的审判；怜悯胜过审判。
